subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up on our conversation at the conference last month. We'd be glad to schedule a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

Here are some available time slots for next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please confirm which slot works for you, and we'll set up the call.

Regarding your request for direct contact details of our senior leadership, I'm unable to share internal personnel information. Please refer to our public website for official contact channels.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
